_comment_2: Defines dependencies, scripts, and metadata for the React app.
name: sciencebowl-online-frontend
_comment_private: private: true prevents accidentally publishing to npm
_comment_deps_explain: DEPENDENCIES - Packages required to run the application
_comment_react: react: The core React library for building UI components
_comment_reactdom: react-dom: React renderer for web browsers (DOM manipulation)
_comment_router: react-router-dom: Client-side routing (maps URLs to components)
_comment_axios: axios: HTTP client for making API requests (better than fetch)
_comment_framer: framer-motion: Animation library for React (smooth, declarative animations)
_comment_icons: react-icons: Icon library (includes FontAwesome, Material, etc.)
_comment_recharts: recharts: Charting library for React (rating history graphs)
_comment_datefns: date-fns: Date utility library (formatting, parsing dates)
_comment_devdeps_explain: DEV DEPENDENCIES - Only needed during development/build
_comment_vite_plugin: @vitejs/plugin-react: Vite plugin for React (enables JSX, Fast Refresh)
_comment_eslint: eslint: JavaScript linter for finding and fixing problems in code
_comment_eslint_plugin_react: eslint-plugin-react: React-specific linting rules for ESLint
_comment_eslint_plugin_react_hooks: eslint-plugin-react-hooks: ESLint rules for React hooks
_comment_dev: dev: Start development server with hot reload (instant updates)
_comment_build: build: Create production build (minified, optimized for deployment)
_comment_preview: preview: Preview production build locally (test before deploying)
_comment_lint: lint: Run ESLint to find and fix problems in code
